assets.description: Four-frame transparent motion strip for the compact Mantis-01 mining pod with drill, treads, skids, antenna mast, and subtle strut motion.
assets.intended_use: Rig player sprite animation, four horizontal 80x80 frames.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation on chroma key, then locally keyed to alpha and packed into exact frame cells.

assets.description: Wide surface facilities plate with refinery, rig bay, assay desk, survey relay, and launch gantry in a restrained industrial style.
assets.intended_use: Static surface base panel or top-of-run context art.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation and cropped/resized to exact 640x160 dimensions.

assets.description: Square launch context plate showing a vertical shaft collar descending from surface base structures into layered strata.
assets.intended_use: Launch shaft context scene or menu/state panel art.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation and resized to exact 320x320 dimensions.

assets.description: Upper loam and gritstone strata tile with subdued dark mineral plates and grid-readable edges.
assets.intended_use: Repeating terrain tile for upper mining strata.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation, downsampled, sharpened, and edge-blended for tile use.

assets.description: Deep basalt and core rind strata tile, darker and denser with restrained teal seam accents.
assets.intended_use: Repeating terrain tile for deeper mining strata.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation, downsampled, sharpened, and edge-blended for tile use.

assets.description: Pressure glass and choir slate tile with smoky dark glass facets and faint luminous fractures.
assets.intended_use: Repeating terrain tile for pressure glass or choir slate strata.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation, downsampled, sharpened, and edge-blended for tile use.

assets.description: Transparent six-cell ore and hazard atlas: copper seed, saltglass, cobalt thread, heat fissure, gas vent, and magnetic bloom.
assets.intended_use: Six centered 64x64 readables/icons in a 384x128 atlas.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation on chroma key, then locally keyed to alpha and packed into six cells.

assets.description: Transparent five-cell HUD icon atlas for hull, energy, heat, cargo, and depth.
assets.intended_use: Five centered 64x64 HUD icons in a 320x64 atlas.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation on chroma key, then locally keyed to alpha and packed into five cells.

assets.description: Transparent eight-cell upgrade and research atlas: drill, cargo, scanner, hazard sheath, refinery loop, anchor recall, coolant dump, and archive relay.
assets.intended_use: Eight centered 64x64 upgrade icons in a 512x128 atlas.
assets.notes: Generated with built-in image generation on chroma key, then locally keyed to alpha and packed into eight cells.

notes: Original Corebound bitmap asset pack generated with Codex built-in image generation only; final project-consumed PNGs were saved under games/corebound/assets.
